description.ko: 음파가 물리적 형태를 갖추는 과정을 시각적으로 표현하여, 진동과 공명을 통해 일시적인 건축적 경이로움을 구축합니다.
description.en: A visual representation of sound waves taking physical form, constructing a temporary architectural marvel through vibration and resonance.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Frequency Cathedral.' A central vibrating core generates complex #4169E1 royal blue waves that transform into architectural crystalline structures. The surrounding dark void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic frequency bars and #FFD700 gold light filaments that vibrate in response to a deep #FF4500 electric orange pulse. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, intricate holographic UI elements reflecting frequency data, and fluid motion blur on the vibrating edges. 8k resolution, visualizing the physical weight and resonance of sound in a silent vacuum.
